ddls:
CREATE TABLE "experiments" (
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each experiment */,
  "experiment_name" TEXT /* Name assigned to the experiment */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the experiment */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project the experiment belongs to */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the experiment was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the experiment was last updated */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the experiment */,
  "tags" TEXT /* Tags for the experiment (e.g., ['training', 'evaluation']) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiments_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name assigned to the project */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the project was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the project was last updated */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the associated experiment */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the model */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the model */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of model (e.g., regression, classification) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the model was created */,
  "framework" TEXT /* Framework used to build the model (e.g., TensorFlow, PyTorch) */,
  "algorithm" TEXT /* Algorithm used to train the model (e.g., linear regression, random forest) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_models_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "datasets" (
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the associated experiment */,
  "dataset_name" TEXT /* Name of the dataset */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Type of data (e.g., training, validation) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the dataset was created */,
  "size" INTEGER /* Size of the dataset in bytes */,
  "format" TEXT /* Format of the dataset (e.g., CSV, JSON) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_datasets_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "training_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each training result */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the associated model */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the dataset used for training */,
  "accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy of the model */,
  "precision" REAL /* Precision of the model */,
  "recall" REAL /* Recall of the model */,
  "f1_score" REAL /* F1-score of the model */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the result was recorded */,
  "evaluation_metrics" TEXT /* Additional evaluation metrics (e.g., ROC-AUC, mean squared error) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_training_results_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_training_results_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "hyperparameters" (
  "hyperparameter_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each hyperparameter setting */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the associated model */,
  "param_name" TEXT /* Name of the hyperparameter */,
  "param_value" TEXT /* Value of the hyperparameter */,
  "param_type" TEXT /* Type of the hyperparameter (e.g., integer, float, categorical) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("hyperparameter_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_hyperparameters_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., data scientist, admin) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance metric entry */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the associated model */,
  "metrics_data" TEXT /* JSON object containing various performance metrics */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the metrics were recorded */,
  "evaluation_interval" TEXT /* Evaluation interval for the metrics (e.g., daily, weekly) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_preprocessing" (
  "preprocessing_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each preprocessing step */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the associated dataset */,
  "step_name" TEXT /* Name of the preprocessing step */,
  "parameters" TEXT /* JSON object containing parameters for the preprocessing step */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the preprocessing step was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("preprocessing_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_preprocessing_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model version */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the associated model */,
  "version_number" TEXT /* Version number of the model */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the model version was created */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the model version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_versions_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_deployments" (
  "deployment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model deployment */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the associated model */,
  "deployed_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the model was deployed */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the deployment (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "environment" TEXT /* Environment where the model is deployed (e.g., production, staging) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("deployment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_deployments_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log entry */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the accessed model */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user accessing the model */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the model was accessed */,
  "action" TEXT /* Type of action taken (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the model */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_access_logs_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback entry */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the associated model */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user providing feedback */,
  "feedback" TEXT /* Text feedback about the model */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating of the model (e.g., 1-5) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the feedback was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_feedback_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_feedback_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_collaborations" (
  "collaboration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each collaboration entry */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the associated model */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user collaborating on the model */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user in the collaboration (e.g., owner, contributor) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the collaboration was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("collaboration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_collaborations_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_collaborations_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
